description.value:
Requirements You have at least one hand free.

You swoop down, use your strong cilia to grab your friend, and fly them off to safety. Fly twice. At any point during this movement, you can [[/act grapple]] one willing ally within reach. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Grapple] your ally if you have two free hands or they have a free hand and are aware of you. The @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed] condition ends once you have completed your movement.
